title: Try, Try Again
lesson: If you fall down, you can get back up and try again.
prompts: Place the person from the input image on a sunny park path, sitting on a little red balance bike with both feet on the ground, wearing a snug safety helmet. The person from the input image is on the far left, facing the camera in an eye-level medium shot with their face fully visible and an excited smile. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands to the right, one hand resting gently on the bike, smiling encouragingly. Green grass, leafy trees, warm morning sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene: on the same sunny park path, the person from the input image wobbles on the little red balance bike, wearing the safety helmet, leaning slightly to one side with a surprised expression. The person from the input image is on the far left, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible in an eye-level three-quarter shot. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands to the right, reaching out a hand, looking watchful and ready to help. Green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Show the person from the input image after a gentle tumble, sitting safely on the soft green grass beside the little red balance bike, still wearing the safety helmet, with a tiny pout but no tears. The person from the input image is on the far left, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible in an eye-level medium shot. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels to the right, leaning in kindly and offering an open hand. Sunny park path, leafy trees, warm light, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene: on the same sunny park path, the person from the input image stands back up next to the little red balance bike, wearing the safety helmet, brushing off the grass with a determined little smile. The person from the input image is on the far left, facing the camera in an eye-level medium shot with their face fully visible. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches to the right, clapping and cheering them on warmly. Green grass, leafy trees, warm sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the person from the input image riding the little red balance bike a short way along the sunny park path, wearing the safety helmet, beaming with delight, both feet gliding just above the ground. The person from the input image is on the far left, head and torso turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible in an eye-level three-quarter shot, not a back view. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} stands further to the right in the background, cheering with both arms raised. Green grass, leafy trees, bright sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Show a warm resolution on the sunny park path: the person from the input image stands proudly beside the little red balance bike, wearing the safety helmet, with a big happy smile. The person from the input image is on the far left, facing the camera in an eye-level medium shot with their face fully visible. {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels to the right, cheering and giving a thumbs-up with a proud, delighted expression. Green grass, leafy trees, golden afternoon sunlight, soft, bright storybook illustration style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
